column15743: Whole transcriptome sequencing in 274 glioma patients reveals gene fusion profiling and novel candidate fusion genes
column15744: We detected fusion genes in 274 fresh surgical samples of gliomas using whole transcriptome sequencing. Using this approach we screened a panel of glioma samples and identified a number of activating novel fusion transcripts. Overall design: Fusion detection in 274 glioma patients
column15756: Total RNA was isolated using RNeasy Mini Kit (Qiagen) according to the manufacturer’s instructions RNA libraries were prepared using TruSeq RNA library perparation kit following standard Illumina protocols

column15743: Transcriptional changes induced by bevacizumab combination therapy in responding and non-responding recurrent glioblastoma patients
column15744: Purpose: To identify transcriptional changes by RNA-seq in tumor samples, before bevacizumab combination treatment and after bevacizumab combination treatment in both responding and non-responding recurrent glioblastoma patients Overall design: Three comparison analyses were further performed: 1.) Paired analysis of pre- and post-treated samples from responding patients; 2.) Comparison of pre-treated samples of responders vs. non-responders; 3.) Paired analysis of pre- and post-treated samples from non-responding patients The sample ''characteristics: batch'' represents a combination of the RNA-extraction date and the library-preparation date for each sample.
column15756: RNA was extracted from 3*10 micron thick FFPE sections using Deparaffinization Solution (Qiagen, Ca. No. 19093) and RNAeasy FFPE kit (Qiagen, Ca. No. 73504). Library preparation was carried out using the strand-specific Ovation Human FFPE RNA-seq Library System from Nugen according to the instructions from the manufacturer. 250 ng of total RNA was used for library construction.

column15743: RNA Sequencing of adult high grade glioblastoma tumors
column15744: RNA extracted from fresh frozen adult high grade glioblastomas were sequenced for transcriptomic analysis. Overall design: Fresh frozen glioblastoma human primary tumor samples (24 IDH WT glioblastomas, Age: Min = 29, Max = 84, median = 65; 12 Male, 12 Female)
column15746: GSM3106683: Glioblastoma Tumor 1; Homo sapiens; RNA-Seq
column15756: Tumors were removed, flash frozen, and RNA was harvested using MAXWELL RSC SIMPLY RNA TISSUE kit by Promega (AS1340). RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard Illumina protocols
